_comment: DOSM median MONTHLY household income (RM), national and by state, per Household Income Survey year — used to show each seat's median as a % of the national and state benchmark. National + Johor figures corroborated via multiple independent search excerpts (DOSM releases + press). Melaka figures adversarially re-checked 2026-07-11: 2022 = RM6,210 (DOSM HIS 2022; an earlier RM6,518 draft figure was unsupported and corrected), 2024 = RM6,891 (DOSM HIS 2024). Direct page loads of DOSM are proxy-blocked in the build sandbox, hence CONFIRMED rather than VERIFIED. Melaka seat income is a single 2020 estimate, so the app compares it to the nearest benchmark year common to national+state (2022) and labels that year. Re-verify against OpenDOSM hh_income_state before printing campaign material.
